name: ctx-tree-vscode
description: Real-time property graph visualizer for the ctx-tree context store

scripts.copy-ui: mkdir -p media && cp ../../mcp/src/visualize/ui.html media/ui.html && cp node_modules/d3/dist/d3.min.js media/d3.min.js
scripts.copy-bin: mkdir -p bin && (cd ../ctx-tree && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --outfile ../ctx-tree-vscode/bin/ctx-tree) && chmod +x bin/ctx-tree
scripts.build: npm run copy-ui && npm run copy-bin && npm run compile
